info.name: DynDisc2-MultiContract-AR-AP-CashReserve-fix3-timeepoch-1
info.description:
Dynamic Discounting 2 – fix3-timeepoch-1

PATTERN CHANGE vs fix3:
  fix3 aggregated in sequential per-contract phases (AR-001..005 then AP-001..005).
  timeepoch-1 mirrors the stablecoin Approach3 pattern: aggregations occur at TIME EPOCHS
  defined by the monitoringEventTimes embedded in each EarlySettlementModel.

EPOCH SCHEDULE (10 epochs, one per monitoring/settlement date, chronologically ordered):
  Epoch-1   2026-02-22  AR-INV-004  ($550 @4%)
  Epoch-2   2026-02-28  AR-INV-001  ($500 @3%)
  Epoch-3   2026-03-03  AP-INV-001  ($400 @3%)
  Epoch-4   2026-03-07  AP-INV-003  ($350 @5%)
  Epoch-5   2026-03-09  AR-INV-002  ($600 @5%)
  Epoch-6   2026-03-25  AP-INV-002  ($500 @4%)
  Epoch-7   2026-03-30  AR-INV-003  ($450 @2%)
  Epoch-8   2026-04-06  AP-INV-004  ($600 @2%)
  Epoch-9   2026-04-08  AR-INV-005  ($480 @5%)
  Epoch-10  2026-04-17  AP-INV-005  ($420 @3%)

MECHANICS:
  - Single 'Epoch Evaluator' request loops via postman.setNextRequest() through all 10 epochs.
  - At each epoch the pre-request resolves every contract settling on that date:
      AR: pm.sendRequest() to ACTUS /rf2/scenarioSimulation -> reads PP.payoff.
      AP: client-side LINEAR discount (RPL PP=0 engine limitation).
  - After any epoch containing an AP, CASH_RESERVE_01 is refreshed via pm.sendRequest.
  - Per-epoch summary logged (contracts settled, AR inflow, AP outflow, net, running cashReserve).
  - epochHistory[] accumulates all epoch snapshots for the final timeline table.

FINAL NUMBERS (identical to fix3 – same contracts, same math):
  Opening $1,000.00  ->  Closing $1,296.32
  AR inflows $2,525.93   AP outflows $2,229.61   Net +$296.32
  Combined discount savings $94.46

SERVICES REQUIRED:
  localhost:8082  actus-risk-service
  localhost:8083  actus-contract-engine

item.name: 6. Initialize – CSH + Epoch Schedule
item.description: Resets all state, builds the 10-epoch schedule sorted by monitoringEventTime, confirms opening cash via CSH simulation.

exec: // 10 epochs keyed by monitoringEventTimes, in chronological date order.
// Each contract entry carries everything the Epoch Evaluator needs to
console.log('  10 epochs  Feb 22 – Apr 17 2026  Opening $' + OPENING.toFixed(2));
console.log('  CSH confirmed. 10-epoch schedule ready. Starting Epoch Evaluator loop.');

item.name: Epoch Evaluator
item.description:
Single looping request driven by postman.setNextRequest().
Pre-request: reads epochSchedule[epochIndex], resolves all payoffs
  AR -> pm.sendRequest to ACTUS /rf2/scenarioSimulation, extracts PP.payoff
  AP -> client-side LINEAR formula (RPL PP=0 engine limitation)
Stores results in _epoch_settlements for the test script.
Test script: applies settlements, updates cashReserve + all ledgers,
  refreshes CASH_RESERVE_01 if any AP settled, appends epochHistory,
  increments epochIndex, loops or routes to Final Summary.

exec: // Recursive processor handles mixed AR/AP lists including async ACTUS calls
console.warn('ACTUS call failed for ' + c.contractID + ' – payoff defaulted 0');
settlements.push({ contractID:c.contractID, role:'AR', notional:c.notional, payoff:payoff, saving:saving });
settlements.push({ contractID:c.contractID, role:'AP', notional:c.notional, payoff:payoffAP, saving:savingAP });
// Route immediately if init already exhausted the schedule
// Refresh CASH_RESERVE_01 after any AP settlement
else console.log('   CASH_RESERVE_01 refreshed to $' + cashReserve.toFixed(2) + ' HTTP ' + res.code);
console.log('║  AR inflow this ep  : +$' + epochArInflow.toFixed(2) + '  savings $' + epochArSavings.toFixed(2));
console.log('║  AP outflow this ep :  $' + epochApOutflow.toFixed(2) + '  savings $' + epochApSavings.toFixed(2));
console.log('All 10 epochs processed. Routing to Final Summary.');

item.name: ══ FINAL SUMMARY ══
item.description: Reads epochHistory and all ledger accumulators. Prints the time-epoch timeline table followed by the full AR/AP ledger and savings analysis identical to fix3.

exec: console.log('  DynDisc2 fix3-timeepoch-1  |  AR/AP Multi-Contract + Dynamic Cash Reserve');
console.log('  Aggregation pattern: TIME EPOCHS keyed by monitoringEventTimes');
console.log('  ── AR Settlement Ledger (' + arLedger.length + ' contracts) ──');
console.log('  ── AP Settlement Ledger (' + apLedger.length + ' contracts) ──');
console.log('  Total AR inflows  : +$' + arTotal.toFixed(2) + '  (' + arLedger.length + ' contracts)');
console.log('  Total AP outflows :  $' + apTotal.toFixed(2) + '  (' + apLedger.length + ' contracts)');
console.log('  AR supplier savings  : $' + arSavings.toFixed(2) + '  (suppliers received less than face)');
console.log('  AP OurCo savings     : $' + apSavings.toFixed(2) + '  (OurCo paid less than face)');
console.log('  ENGINE NOTE: ACTUS RPL role returns PP.payoff=0 (known engine limitation).');
console.log('  CORRECT RPL cash flows: IED=+notional  PP=-discountedAmt  MD=0.');
console.log('  AP amounts computed client-side via LINEAR formula in Epoch Evaluator pre-request.');
console.log('  EPOCH PATTERN: aggregations driven by monitoringEventTimes, not AR/AP phases.');
pm.test('AR ledger has 5 entries',        function(){ pm.expect(arLedger.length).to.equal(5); });
pm.test('AP ledger has 5 entries',        function(){ pm.expect(apLedger.length).to.equal(5); });
